note: TODDLER stage. A waitlisted family is offered a toddler-room spot, with an accept-and-deposit deadline — daycare_application_response. Hand-derived from taxonomy: a formal reply to an application / an enrolment offer is daycare_application_response, NOT routine daycare_communication.

input.rawContent:
From: admin@sunnydays-daycare.ca
Subject: Toddler room offer for your application

We're pleased to offer your family a spot in our toddler room starting September 2. To accept, please confirm and e-transfer the $300 deposit within 5 business days, otherwise the spot is released to the next family on our waitlist.
